---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for DoubtDesk
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? Who benefits from it (students, teachers, admins)?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this working. Include details about:
- Where in the application it would live (page, component, API route)
- How users would interact with it
- Any new data or API changes required

## Alternatives Considered
Have you thought about other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed approach preferable?

## Mockups or References
If applicable, add wireframes, mockups, screenshots, or links to similar features in other applications.

## Implementation Notes
If you have technical insights on how this could be implemented, share them here. This is optional but helpful for contributors who may pick up the issue.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, edge cases, or related issues here.
